Member.name: hide_dpc
Member.help: set to true to hide DPC so it is not enabled by the OS

Struct.name: pcie_prod_rp_cfg_t
Struct.help: Available knobs to configure the RP in prod FW

Struct.name: pcie_prod_cfg_t
Struct.help: Available knobs to configure the RPSS in prod FW

Member.name: pcie_ss_en
Member.help: Set to false to force disable the pciess block

Member.name: pcie_cxl_sync_header_bypass
Member.help: Sync header bypass for CXL Flex Bus

Struct.name: pcie_prod_phy_cfg_t
Struct.help: Knobs to configure PHY per lane per RPSS

Knob.name: pcie_configuration_mirroring
Knob.help: Set to true to mirror RPSS configurations on dual SoC boards

Knob.name: die1_rpss_enabled
Knob.help: Set to false to disable die1 RPSS instances

Knob.name: enable_overlake_sbr_workaround
Knob.help: Set to true to enable secondary bus reset workaround for Overlake card

Knob.name: overlake_rpss_index_primary_soc
Knob.help: Index of the RPSS where the Overlake card is located if this is SoC 1

Knob.name: overlake_rpss_index_secondary_soc
Knob.help: Index of the RPSS where the Overlake card is located if this is SoC 2

Knob.name: pcie_rpss0_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_4X4, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss1_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_4X4, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss2_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_4X4, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss3_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_1X16, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss4_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_1X16, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss5_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_1X16, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss6_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_1X16, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss7_cfg
Knob.default: {true, PCIE_BIFURCATION_1X16, false}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss0_rp0_cfg
Knob.default: {{true, 0, true, 8, false, true, false, false, false, 251, false, PCIE_FIPS_NO_TEST, PCIE_RAS_MODE_EN, true, true, true, PCIE_L1_SUPPORT, PCIE_L0S_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_4_US, PCIE_L1_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_8_US, PCIE_L1_LATENCY_32_TO_64_US, PCIE_L0S_LATENCY_2_TO_4_US, true, PCIE_CLOCK_SRIS, PCIE_STAGGER_NONE, PCIE_LOOPBACK_NONE, PCIE_GEN_5, PCIE_MAX_1024B_SIZE, PCIE_RP_RCB_64B, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, true, PCIE_MSI_REQ_1_VECTOR},{ false, false, false}}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss0_rp1_cfg
Knob.default: {{true, 1, true, 9, false, true, false, false, false, 251, false, PCIE_FIPS_NO_TEST, PCIE_RAS_MODE_EN, true, true, true, PCIE_L1_SUPPORT, PCIE_L0S_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_4_US, PCIE_L1_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_8_US, PCIE_L1_LATENCY_32_TO_64_US, PCIE_L0S_LATENCY_2_TO_4_US, true, PCIE_CLOCK_SRIS, PCIE_STAGGER_NONE, PCIE_LOOPBACK_NONE, PCIE_GEN_5, PCIE_MAX_1024B_SIZE, PCIE_RP_RCB_64B, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, true, PCIE_MSI_REQ_1_VECTOR},{ false, false, false}}
